description: Create an 'Acquisitions Dashboard' to programmatically bulk-update 30 pending book tiddlers tagged 'AcquisitionQueue'. The dashboard must include a 'Process Batch' button that updates all tiddlers tagged 'AcquisitionQueue' by setting their 'catalog-status' field to 'Complete', removing the 'AcquisitionQueue' tag, and adding the 'MainCollection' tag. Execute the bulk-update by clicking the button. Do not manually edit the individual book tiddlers.
